ocr_findings.description: The physical book page number printed at the bottom of the image is '471', but this file is stored as page_487 in the pipeline. This is a pre-existing pipeline page-index offset, not an OCR error. The OCR text also ends with '471', faithfully reproducing what is printed.
Chapter sidebar '第14章 ネットワーク' is captured as a broken line ('第14章 ネットワーク') at the end of the OCR output rather than omitted. Cosmetic artifact from vertical sidebar.

reviewer_notes: Content page covering 14-04 インターネットの仕組み — specifically the 住所とIPアドレスの関係 table and ポート番号とMACアドレス section. The two-column comparison table (現実の世界/ネットワークの世界) is correctly captured with example values. All prose on IP address uniqueness, ICANN, port numbers, and application software identification is accurately transcribed. The pipeline file-index vs book-page-number discrepancy (487 vs 471) is a known offset issue, not an OCR fault.
